idea.title: Facade Foreman
idea.hook: A movie camera car drives a top-down film backlot — layer fake window/AC/balcony chips on building flats along its route before the take starts.
idea.prototype: 8x6 top-down grid = backlot. Each take, director draws a yellow camera-car route across the block. Player has 5 chips per take (window stickers, AC boxes, balcony silhouettes, curtain layers, signage). Drag onto building tiles along route. Each visible tile needs 3+ layers or 'reads flat.' Camera car drives route, scores each visible tile. 10 takes per session.
idea.mutation_of: Direct mutation of telegram-digest 'Backlot Block' idea + Yandex 'По Полочкам' sorting trend + crazygames 'My Perfect Theme Park'.
idea.why_novel: Facade-layering with a camera-car validator angle is uncovered. Existing sort/place games validate by static rules, not by a moving observer's perspective.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Chip budget (5/take) + take count (3 failed = director walks)
idea.lose_condition: Director rejects 3 of 10 takes because facade layer depth read as flat from the camera car angle.
